config.title: Błędna etykieta - popaw dane
config.script:
dim g_etykieta dim g_inx dim g_nr
function popraw_dane ( byref etykieta , byref inx , byref num , byval title )
page_.topelement.title = title
if isEmpty(inx) then inx = "" end if
if isEmpty(num) then num = "" end if
g_etykieta = etykieta g_inx = inx g_nr = num
page_.result = false
dim tb set tb = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TABLE_RESULTS)).removeall
tb.newrow
tb.newcell.addtext("Przeczytany numer etykiety").element.bold = true if etykieta <> "" then tb.newcell.addtext(etykieta).element.size = 20').element.bold = true else tb.newcell.addtext("<pusty>").element.size = 20 tb.element.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) end if
tb.newrow tb.newcell.addtext("Zdekodowany indeks produktu").element.bold = true tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_EDIT , -1 with tb.element .size=20 .value = inx .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_INX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with
tb.newrow tb.newcell.addtext("Zdekodowany numer kolejny etykiety").element.bold = true tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_EDIT , -1 with tb.element .size=20 .value = cstr(num) .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_NUM) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with
tb.newrow tb.newcell.addtext("Złożony numer etykiety").element.bold = true tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_EDIT , -1 with tb.element .size=20 .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_ET) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with
popraw_dane = page_.domodalauto()
if popraw_dane then etykieta = g_etykieta inx = g_inx num = g_nr end if
end function
function fok page_.result = true page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.result = false page_.goback end function
function c##CTRLID_INX##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_INX##_ongetdata = true pCtrl.value = g_inx end function
function c##CTRLID_NUM##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_NUM##_ongetdata = true pCtrl.value = g_nr end function
function c##CTRLID_ET##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_ET##_ongetdata = true pCtrl.value = g_etykieta end function
function c##CTRLID_INX##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_INX##_ondataentered = true g_inx = varValue g_etykieta = g_inx + "Y" + g_nr end function
function c##CTRLID_NUM##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_NUM##_ondataentered = true g_nr = varValue g_etykieta = g_inx + "Y" + g_nr end function
